nasb.text: according to the glorious gospel of the blessed God, with which I have been entrusted.

esv.text: in accordance with the gospel of the glory of the blessed God with which I have been entrusted.

cnv.text: 這是照著可稱頌之　神所交託我的榮耀福音說的。

ccb.text: 这正道来自当受称颂的上帝托付我传扬的荣耀福音。

csbs.text: 这教义是照着当受称颂之神的荣耀福音，就是所委托给我的福音。
